sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n74703" key="o)pwroka/phlos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀπωρο-κάπηλος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾰ]</pron><foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">, ὁ</foreign> or <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n74703.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fruiterer,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0640.tlg001:3:60" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alciphr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.60</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
